summary: Iteration 4 — Backend & Frontend tested for the Guides feature, expanded SiteConfig, inquiry guide_id support, and new seal URL. Backend: 19/22 pytest pass. CRITICAL backend bug: POST /api/inquiries unconditionally validates partner_id (line 1224 of server.py) — guide_id inquiries return 404 'Partner not found'; inquiries with neither id return 404 instead of 400; admin_inquiries therefore never contains a guide_id record. All other backend checks green: 4 guides seeded with 10-char hex seal_code, public list/detail/filter/categories work, LLM translation EN/ES works and keeps people's names, admin CRUD on /api/guides works (seal auto-generated), expanded site_config has all new fields, seal URL contains the new asset id '279fc9d7-...-c1224', about_pt and show_guides_tab persist via PUT. Frontend: /guides lists 4 guides with photos/specialties/languages/seal ribbon, filters render, navigation to /guide/{id} works, contact buttons (whatsapp-btn/phone-btn/email-btn/instagram-btn) render with brand colors, inquiry form (testIDs inq-name/email/message/submit) opens — but submission FAILS due to the backend bug above. Home shows 5-shortcut row (Mapa/Guias/Parceiros/Perto/Emergência) and SealFooter loads the new official seal. Admin dashboard shows 5 quick actions (goto-site, goto-admin-guides, goto-translations, goto-inquiries, seed-button); /admin/guides shows 4 guide rows with edit/delete and the new-guide form (save-guide-button + all g-* fields). /admin/site shows all new sections (Identidade do app, Sobre o projeto, Contato oficial, Emergência, Visibilidade). /emergency reads numbers from site_config (192/193/190 visible). Note: testIDs in implementation differ from the review request — actual values: admin-email-input/admin-password-input/admin-login-button (not admin-email/password/login-submit), goto-admin-guides (not quick-guides), open-inquiry-btn (not open-inquiry), whatsapp-btn/phone-btn/email-btn/instagram-btn (not contact-*). Direct URL navigation to /admin/guides and /admin/site after a hard reload was failing with Unmatched Route until expo bundler caught up — flows work fine when navigated via in-app links (router.push).

critical.issue: Endpoint always queries db.partners by payload.partner_id and raises 404 'Partner not found' even when guide_id is provided (or both are None). guide_id is never validated or persisted via DB lookup. Located at server.py:1222-1231. Must (a) accept guide_id without partner_id, (b) when guide_id provided, look up db.guides and 404 only if not found, (c) reject (400) when neither provided.

minor.issue: When neither partner_id nor guide_id is provided, response is 404 'Partner not found'. Should be 400 'partner_id or guide_id required'.

ui_bugs.issue: Submitting the inquiry form for a guide POSTs {guide_id,name,email,message} but receives 404 from backend (see backend critical bug). UI silently fails or shows error. Reference: /app/frontend/app/guide/[id].tsx:359 (inq-submit). Will work automatically once backend bug is fixed.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend correctly posts guide_id, but backend rejects it (404). End-to-end inquiry flow for guides is broken.

issues: Recurring console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated by react-native-web — migrate to boxShadow. Non-blocking, same as iteration 3.

action_items: FIX BACKEND CRITICAL: /app/backend/server.py:1222 create_inquiry — accept guide_id, validate against db.guides, return 400 when neither partner_id nor guide_id is provided. Suggested logic: if payload.partner_id: validate partner; elif payload.guide_id: validate guide; else 400.

(Optional) Align testIDs with the review-request spec OR update the spec: currently admin-email-input/admin-password-input/admin-login-button, goto-admin-guides, open-inquiry-btn, whatsapp-btn/phone-btn/email-btn/instagram-btn, new-guide-button, edit-guide-/delete-guide-.
(Optional) Once backend is fixed, re-run /app/backend/tests/test_iteration4.py — expecting 22/22 green and the guide inquiry UI flow to succeed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:1222 create_inquiry function predates the guide_id addition: payload schema accepts guide_id but the handler still hardcodes partner_id validation. This is the single largest defect of iteration 4.
Models look correct (InquiryCreate/Inquiry both have Optional partner_id and guide_id). Persistence already includes guide_id in the dict via payload.dict().
Guide CRUD endpoints are clean: admin-protected, exclude _id, invalidate translation cache on bio/short_bio/name changes — good.
translate_guide correctly keeps the person's name and translates short_bio/bio to en/es with gpt-4o-mini caching — confirmed in tests.
Default site_config includes the migration that rewrites the old seal URL to the new 279fc9d7-... asset on startup (server.py:1276-1284) — verified live.

success_rate.frontend: ~85% — all read & navigation flows pass; guide inquiry submit blocked by backend bug

seed_data_creation: Re-seeded via /api/seed (14 spots, 6 partners, 4 guides). Created several TEST_-prefixed inquiries via tests (TEST_Guide_Inquiry_User attempt failed, TEST_Partner_Inquiry succeeded). One TEST_Admin_Guide was created+updated+deleted within a single test (round-trip cleaned). No leftover guides expected; partner inquiries remain (safe to ignore).
context_for_next_testing_agent: After the backend fix to POST /api/inquiries (must branch on guide_id vs partner_id and return 400 when both missing), re-run `EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=$(grep EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL /app/frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2) pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration4.py -v`. The three currently failing tests are: test_inquiry_with_guide_id_succeeds, test_inquiry_without_partner_or_guide, test_admin_inquiries_includes_both_types. Mobile viewport for UI testing is 390x844. Use router-navigated paths (click goto-* buttons) rather than direct page.goto on /admin/* routes — expo SSR sometimes returns Unmatched Route on cold direct navigation.
rca_of_issue: Bug RCA — Guide inquiry 404: server.py:1224 unconditionally executes `partner = await db.partners.find_one({'id': payload.partner_id}, ...)` and raises 404 when not found, regardless of whether guide_id was supplied. The Inquiry model and frontend correctly pass guide_id, but the handler was not refactored for iteration 4. Reproduction: `curl -X POST $EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL/api/inquiries -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"guide_id":"<valid_guide_uuid>","name":"x","email":"x@x.com","message":"x"}'` → 404 'Partner not found'. Fix: replace the unconditional partner lookup with conditional logic: if partner_id provided, lookup partner; elif guide_id provided, lookup guide; else raise 400.
